videos.headline: Vanderbilt holds off Auburn in OT thriller
videos.description: Vanderbilt keeps their playoff hopes alive as they take down Auburn in an overtime thriller.

tracking.trackingName: COM_NCF Highlight (Vanderbilt holds off Auburn in OT thriller) 2025/11/08 ESHEET

videos.headline: Highlight: No. 16 Vanderbilt takes OT thriller vs. Auburn
videos.description: The Commodores come from behind and escape the Tigers' grasp as Diego Pavia finds Cole Spencer for the TD in overtime in a matchup that had a combined 1107 yards of total offense.
